headline: Assessing CF Industries Holdings (CF) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Gains
summary: Why CF Industries Holdings (CF) Is Back on Investors’ Radar CF Industries Holdings (CF) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share performance, with the stock up about 17% over the past month and roughly 31% in the past 3 months. For context, the nitrogen fertilizer producer has a market price near $104.71, supported by annual revenue of about $7.1b and net income of roughly $1.5b, giving investors concrete figures to weigh against recent returns. See our latest analysis for CF...
